name: Quiche Filled Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash mushrooms and pat dry. Remove stems; chop and set aside.
2. In a large skillet, fry bacon until crisp. Drain, then crumble.
3. Brush mushroom caps with 4 tablespoons of butter. Place in a large shallow baking pan.
4. Fry onion in remaining butter about 2 minutes. Add reserved stems and cook 2 minutes longer.
5. Remove from heat. Lightly beat eggs in a bowl.
6. Stir in cream, cheese, and salt. Stir in crumbled bacon and the mushroom mixture.
7. Spoon enough filling into each mushroom to come to the top.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until filling is set.
